form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.26) at Ballarat in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 2.75 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (31.26) at Ballarat in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 2.75 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when she won comfortably by 6 lengths at this track (25.75) beating Jungle Fireball in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 7. Flying lately and can score again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when she won comfortably by 6 lengths at this track (25.75) beating Jungle Fireball in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 7. Flying lately and can score again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 19 length eighth (31.50) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 19 length eighth (31.50) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at Ballarat (25.69) beating Vintage King in a Grade 5 on April 13 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at Ballarat (25.69) beating Vintage King in a Grade 5 on April 13 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing last on April 11 over 525m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing last on April 11 over 525m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.45 last start, beating Dapper Chap. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.45 last start, beating Dapper Chap. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Better than last run and looks an each way chance.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Better than last run and looks an each way chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide on first turn.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Sandown over 515m in 29.76. Followed that up with a minor placing over 300m at Healesville at Grade 5 H five days ago. Capable of improvement.
